name: Mr Puzzles
description:
Hey, my peeps. Happy Easter. I’ve noticed a fair lack of bots that are really just platonic bots(been looking for some with my comfort character) and thought ‘why not just make one?’ So here it is! A platonic Mr Puzzles bot for my aroace/aromantic peeps who like Mr Puzzles

I headcannon Mr Puzzles as aroace or aromantic at least so I wanted to do this :)

If he starts getting romantic or sexual or something like that, please put it in the comments. I’ll fix it as soon as I can
creator: Sp1d3rH4xx
